channel.title: Announcement on Turn of War: Endless Crusade
channel.description: Recent content in Announcement on Turn of War: Endless Crusade

item.title: Welcome to Endless Crusade
item.description:
We are thrilled to announce Turn of War: Endless Crusade, a new chapter in the Turn of War franchise.

Endless Crusade brings together multiple eras of warfare into a single, cohesive turn-based strategy experience. Command armies spanning pike and shot formations, mechanised infantry, and advanced robotic warfare — all on the same battlefield.

Stay tuned for development updates, gameplay reveals, and more. Wishlist now on Steam and join our Discord to be part of the journey from day one.
